null_recomputation_policy: Preserve timestamps, contracts, raw first- and second-half trade volume and aggressive-flow fields, hence the frozen outcome-free signal paths. Recompute every price-derived field in each null world before identical account episodes.
promotion_policy: ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY tombstones the exact mechanism class before candidate power, null, DSR/BH, Combine, or shadow work. GREEN_NULL_ADJUSTED_BASELINE permits power audit only for frozen walk-forward-positive candidates.
CONTRE: The price-null worlds preserve the observed intraminute flow allocation, so they isolate price-path geometry but cannot rule out an unobserved state selecting both the flow allocation and subsequent returns; a green result remains development evidence.
